features: Treatment for dandruff psoriasis dry and itchy scalp.

Xpel Therapeutic Shampoo is specially formulated to relieve dandruff psoriasis and itchy flaky scalps. With a blend of mild surfactants with antidandruff and dermocleansing agents with regular use this shampoo helps to provide effective relief from the above conditions.
We recommend using this shampoo 23 times a week for up to 6 weeks.
description: Product description The pel Therapeutic Shampoo is specially formulated to relieve dandruff, dandruff and itchy, flaky scalps. With a blend of mild surfactants with anti-dandruff and dermo-cleansing agents, with regular use, this shampoo helps to provide effective relief from the above conditions. Contains: Polypeptides mild cleansing surfactants. Directions Use this shampoo 2-3 times a week for up to 6 weeks.
